# Assemble FRS package data


## TODO


## Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| output: false

source("../_common_frs.R")

```


## List of files

```{r}
#| label: file-list

files <- c(
  "base_mortality_rates",
  "current_amort_layers",
  "entrant_profile",
  "final_mortality_rates",
  "headcount",
  "init_funding_data",
  "mortality_improvement",
  "retiree_distribution",
  "retiree_mortality_rates",
  "retirement_rates",
  "salary_growth",
  "salary_headcount",
  "termination_rates"
  ) |> sort()


```


## Read files, assemble list, save list as .rda file

```{r}
#| label: read-assemble-save

f <- function(file){
  fpath <- path(drds, paste0(file, ".rds"))
  print(fpath)
  readRDS(fpath)
}

frs <- files |>
  set_names() |>
  purrr::map(f)

usethis::use_data(frs, overwrite = TRUE)

```


## Explore results

```{r}
#| label: explore-list


for(f in names(frs)){
  print(f)
  frs[[f]] |> ht()
}


```
